template.template: Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
template.name: Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2

trigger.expression: min(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.cpu.util,5m)>{$CPU.UTIL.CRIT}
trigger.name: High CPU utilization (over {$CPU.UTIL.CRIT}% for 5m)
trigger.description: CPU utilization is too high. The system might be slow to respond.

dependency.name: Load average is too high (per CPU load over {$LOAD_AVG_PER_CPU.MAX.WARN} for 5m)

trigger.expression: min(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.mem.util,5m)>{$MEMORY.UTIL.MAX}
trigger.name: High memory utilization (>{$MEMORY.UTIL.MAX}% for 5m)
trigger.description: The system is running out of free memory.

dependency.name: Lack of available memory (<{$MEMORY.AVAILABLE.MIN} of {ITEM.VALUE2})
dependency.expression: max(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.mem["{$SAP.AGENT.URI}","{$SAP.AGENT.USER}","{$SAP.AGENT.PASSWORD}","phy","available"],5m)<{$MEMORY.AVAILABLE.MIN} and last(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.mem["{$SAP.AGENT.URI}","{$SAP.AGENT.USER}","{$SAP.AGENT.PASSWORD}","phy","size"])>0

trigger.expression: last(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.ping["{$SAP.AGENT.URI}","{$SAP.AGENT.USER}","{$SAP.AGENT.PASSWORD}"])=0
trigger.name: SAP agent is unreachable

item.host: Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2

trigger_prototype.expression: min(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.dev["{$SAP.AGENT.URI}","{$SAP.AGENT.USER}","{$SAP.AGENT.PASSWORD}","{#DEVNAME}","wait"],15m) > {$VFS.DEV.AWAIT.WARN:"{#DEVNAME}"}
trigger_prototype.name: {#DEVNAME}: Disk wait time is too high (wait > {$VFS.DEV.AWAIT.WARN:"{#DEVNAME}"} ms for 15m)
trigger_prototype.description: This trigger might indicate disk {#DEVNAME} saturation.

item.host: Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2

discovery_rule.name: Mounted filesystem discovery
discovery_rule.description: Discovery of file systems of different types.

trigger_prototype.expression: last(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.fs.util["{#FSNAME}"])>{$VFS.FS.PUSED.MAX.CRIT:"{#FSNAME}"} and (last(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.fs.size["{$SAP.AGENT.URI}","{$SAP.AGENT.USER}","{$SAP.AGENT.PASSWORD}","{#FSNAME}","free"])<{$VFS.FS.FREE.MIN.CRIT:"{#FSNAME}"} or timeleft(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.fs.util["{#FSNAME}"],1h,100)<1d)
trigger_prototype.name: {#FSNAME}: Filesystem space is low (used > {$VFS.FS.PUSED.MAX.CRIT:"{#FSNAME}"}%)
trigger_prototype.description: Two conditions should match: First, space utilization should be above {$VFS.FS.PUSED.MAX.CRIT:"{#FSNAME}"}. Second condition should be one of the following: - The disk free space is less than {$VFS.FS.FREE.MIN.CRIT:"{#FSNAME}"}. - The disk will be full in less than 24 hours.

trigger_prototype.expression: last(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.fs.util["{#FSNAME}"])>{$VFS.FS.PUSED.MAX.WARN:"{#FSNAME}"} and (last(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.fs.size["{$SAP.AGENT.URI}","{$SAP.AGENT.USER}","{$SAP.AGENT.PASSWORD}","{#FSNAME}","free"])<{$VFS.FS.FREE.MIN.WARN:"{#FSNAME}"} or timeleft(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.fs.util["{#FSNAME}"],1h,100)<1d)
trigger_prototype.name: {#FSNAME}: Filesystem space is low (used > {$VFS.FS.PUSED.MAX.WARN:"{#FSNAME}"}%)
trigger_prototype.description: Two conditions should match: First, space utilization should be above {$VFS.FS.PUSED.MAX.WARN:"{#FSNAME}"}. Second condition should be one of the following: - The disk free space is less than {$VFS.FS.FREE.MIN.WARN:"{#FSNAME}"}. - The disk will be full in less than 24 hours.

dependency.name: {#FSNAME}: Filesystem space is low (used > {$VFS.FS.PUSED.MAX.CRIT:"{#FSNAME}"}%)
dependency.expression: last(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.fs.util["{#FSNAME}"])>{$VFS.FS.PUSED.MAX.CRIT:"{#FSNAME}"} and (last(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.fs.size["{$SAP.AGENT.URI}","{$SAP.AGENT.USER}","{$SAP.AGENT.PASSWORD}","{#FSNAME}","free"])<{$VFS.FS.FREE.MIN.CRIT:"{#FSNAME}"} or timeleft(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.fs.util["{#FSNAME}"],1h,100)<1d)

item.host: Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2

trigger_prototype.expression: min(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.net.in["{$SAP.AGENT.URI}","{$SAP.AGENT.USER}","{$SAP.AGENT.PASSWORD}","{#IFNAME}","errors"],5m)>{$IF.ERRORS.WARN:"{#IFNAME}"} or min(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.net.out["{$SAP.AGENT.URI}","{$SAP.AGENT.USER}","{$SAP.AGENT.PASSWORD}","{#IFNAME}","errors"],5m)>{$IF.ERRORS.WARN:"{#IFNAME}"}
trigger_prototype.recovery_expression: max(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.net.in["{$SAP.AGENT.URI}","{$SAP.AGENT.USER}","{$SAP.AGENT.PASSWORD}","{#IFNAME}","errors"],5m)<{$IF.ERRORS.WARN:"{#IFNAME}"}*0.8 and max(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.net.out["{$SAP.AGENT.URI}","{$SAP.AGENT.USER}","{$SAP.AGENT.PASSWORD}","{#IFNAME}","errors"],5m)<{$IF.ERRORS.WARN:"{#IFNAME}"}*0.8
trigger_prototype.name: Interface {#IFNAME}: High error rate (>{$IF.ERRORS.WARN:"{#IFNAME}"} for 5m)

item.host: Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2

trigger_prototype.expression: (last(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.proc["{#INSTANCE.NAME}","{#PROCESS.NAME}","pid"],#1)<>last(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.proc["{#INSTANCE.NAME}","{#PROCESS.NAME}","pid"],#2))>0
trigger_prototype.name: Process {#PROCESS.DESC} has been restarted

trigger_prototype.expression: find(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.proc["{#INSTANCE.NAME}","{#PROCESS.NAME}","status"],,"regexp","^Running$")=0
trigger_prototype.name: Process {#PROCESS.DESC}: Unexpected status

macro.description: The warning threshold of the available memory.
The warning threshold of the memory utilization.
Disk average wait time (in ms) before the trigger would fire
The critical threshold of the filesystem utilization.
The warning threshold of the filesystem utilization.

value.host: Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
value.name: Device {#DEVNAME}: Disk utilization and queue

value.host: Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
value.name: Device {#DEVNAME}: Disk IO rate

value.host: Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
value.name: Device {#DEVNAME}: Disk throughput

value.host: Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
value.name: Interface {#IFNAME}: Network traffic

value.host: Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
value.name: Interface {#IFNAME}: Network packets

value.host: Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
value.name: System load

value.host: Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
value.name: Memory usage

value.host: Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
value.name: CPU usage

value.host: Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2
value.name: Swap usage

trigger.expression: 100 - max(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.swap.util,5m)<{$SWAP.PFREE.MIN.WARN} and last(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.swap.size["{$SAP.AGENT.URI}","{$SAP.AGENT.USER}","{$SAP.AGENT.PASSWORD}","total"])>0
trigger.name: High swap space usage (less than {$SWAP.PFREE.MIN.WARN}% free)
trigger.description: This trigger is ignored, if there is no swap configured.

trigger.expression: max(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.mem["{$SAP.AGENT.URI}","{$SAP.AGENT.USER}","{$SAP.AGENT.PASSWORD}","phy","available"],5m)<{$MEMORY.AVAILABLE.MIN} and last(/Template SAP Host Agent by Zabbix agent 2/sap.agent.mem["{$SAP.AGENT.URI}","{$SAP.AGENT.USER}","{$SAP.AGENT.PASSWORD}","phy","size"])>0
trigger.name: Lack of available memory (<{$MEMORY.AVAILABLE.MIN} of {ITEM.VALUE2})
Load average is too high (per CPU load over {$LOAD_AVG_PER_CPU.MAX.WARN} for 5m)
trigger.description: Per CPU load average is too high. Your system may be slow to respond.
